Title: feat(engine): enforce anchor parity across DB, TS, and validators
Body:
Align DB constraints, TS model, and runtime validators on canonical anchor contract. Explicit invariant: reject start_offset >= end_offset in all three layers. Add one parity contract test (valid row passes) and negative invariant cases (invalid rows fail).

Done when:
- DB/TS/validator parity suite passes.
- Invalid anchor invariants fail consistently across layers.
- No field drift between schema/model/validator.

Title: feat(extraction): fail-closed on unverifiable or ambiguous anchors
Body:
Remove/forbid fuzzy fallback when extraction anchors cannot be proven. Force explicit classified failure on mismatch and ambiguity paths. Ensure no silent acceptance/skip behavior in extraction flow.

Done when:
- Mismatch path fails closed with expected canonical failure code.
- Ambiguity path fails closed with expected canonical failure code.
- No generic/unclassified fallback in covered extraction failures.

Title: test(extraction): add deterministic edge-case goldens for exact-span contract
Body:
Add deterministic extraction goldens covering: CRLF/LF normalization, Unicode accents + em dash, mixed smart/curly quotes, multiline dialogue, tabs/whitespace-sensitive spans.

Assertions:
- Exact span equality: source.slice(start_offset, end_offset) === original_text
- Deterministic before_context / after_context correctness

Done when:
- All edge goldens pass.
- Context-window assertions pass for every case.
- No drift/partial-capture in covered samples.

Title: test(apply): expand harness for >=99.5% reliability and zero wrong-location edits
Body:
Expand harness corpus (diverse prose, unicode, multiline, punctuation). Cover scenarios: disjoint, adjacent, overlap rejection, duplicate-range rejection, stale-anchor rerun fail-closed. Produce measurable success-rate report artifact.

Quality gates:
- Placement success rate >= 99.5% on valid anchors.
- Wrong-location edits = 0.
- Regression tests for every discovered failure mode.

Done when:
- Harness report generated and archived.
- >=99.5% valid-anchor placement proven.
- Zero wrong-location edits.
- Regression set updated for observed failures.
